title: Nature Toons
description:
A silly and vibrant Minecraft texture pack
which will definitely release... someday... probably...
body:
Nature Toons tries to make Minecraft more vibrant and a little cartoonish

This is a project I have been trying to make for a long time



![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da214935ca0a4b37896d09db2ba91681aa1b8bbd_0.webp)
